entities.name: INDIAN PEANUT CLUMP VIRUS
entities.description: A virus, specifically strain L, characterized by rod-shaped particles and two single-stranded RNA species

entities.name: RNA
entities.description: Single-stranded genetic material extracted from the virus particles

entities.name: GEL ELECTROPHORESIS
entities.description: A technique used to estimate the molecular weight of glyoxal-denatured RNA samples

entities.name: RNA-1
entities.description: A single-stranded RNA species of IPCV with an estimated molecular weight of 1.83 x 10^6

entities.name: RNA-2
entities.description: A single-stranded RNA species of IPCV with an estimated molecular weight of 1.35 x 10^6

entities.name: LESION PRODUCTION
entities.description: The formation of lesions in the leaves of a host plant

entities.name: PHASEOLUS VULGARIS
entities.description: A host plant, specifically cv. Topcrop, used for lesion production tests

entities.name: NUCLEIC ACID HYBRIDIZATION TESTS
entities.description: Tests used to detect nucleotide sequence homologies among virus strains

entities.name: PEANUT CLUMP VIRUS
entities.description: A virus from West Africa of which the Indian isolates are considered strains

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical origin of the peanut clump virus

entities.name: SYMPTOMATOLOGY
entities.description: The set of symptoms associated with the virus infection

entities.name: PARTICLE SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the virus particles

entities.name: MODE OF NATURAL SPREAD
entities.description: The mechanism by which the virus spreads in nature

entities.name: IMMUNOSORBENT ELECTRON MICROSCOPY
entities.description: A technique used to detect relationships between virus strains

entities.name: FUROVIRUS GROUP
entities.description: A proposed group of viruses with specific properties to which PCV belongs

entities.name: BEET NECROTIC YELLOW VEIN VIRUS
entities.description: A virus with no detected serological relationship to PCV

entities.name: POTATO MOP-TOP VIRUS
entities.description: A virus with no detected serological relationship to PCV

entities.name: SOIL-BORNE WHEAT MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: A virus with no detected serological relationship to PCV
